prompt: A hyper-detailed vertical Japanese theme park advertisement poster set in a lush tropical jungle under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds and strong golden sunlight flaring from the upper right. The style is cinematic, photorealistic, dramatic, and slightly absurdist, like a premium satirical travel ad. At the top, huge three-dimensional stone-textured gold Japanese headline text reads ジャンキリア沖縄, with a smaller white Japanese tagline underneath that reads "— やんばるの大自然に包まれた、超本格ジャングル・テーマパーク —". In the center foreground, a giant modern smartphone stands upright, slightly tilted, dominating the composition like a monument. Its screen shows a lottery waiting-ticket interface with a safari silhouette header and large bold Japanese text "整理券抽選中", a dotted loading circle, smaller text "結果発表まで30分", and a tiny note "※この画面を閉じずにお待ちください". The phone status bar shows 10:00. To the left midground, a roaring Tyrannosaurus rex emerges from dense jungle foliage behind a huge aged concrete sign with oversized red Japanese text "待ち時間 180分". To the right midground, an ornate extravagant gold entrance gate to a premium area rises above the trees, with a black signboard reading "プレミアムパス入口" and a red-carpeted queue lane beyond it. A long crowded line of park visitors stretches from the foreground deep into the background along rope barriers; the visitors wear summer vacation clothing, hats, towels, backpacks, handheld fans, water bottles, and parasols, showing exhaustion, heat, and anticipation. In the lower left foreground, 3 stacked rustic wooden signboards are visible: the top board says "駐車場 2,000円" with a parking icon, the middle board says "アプリ必須 ダウンロードしてね!" with a smartphone icon, and the bottom board says "当選者だけが冒険へ" with a dinosaur silhouette. Along the right side, large vertical white brush-style Japanese copy reads 待つこと、それが冒険だ。. Near the lower right are 3 circular gold icon callouts with short Japanese promotional lines: 1 dinosaur icon with "抽選に選ばれし者だけが、恐竜に会える。", 1 smartphone battery icon with "スマホの充電が尽きる前に、夢は始まる。", and 1 VIP icon with "プレミアムな近道も、ご用意しました。". At the very bottom center, include a small black strip with white Japanese disclaimer text: "このポスターは架空のパロディ広告です". The jungle should be dense and glossy with large tropical leaves framing the foreground, warm rim lighting, high contrast, and a polished blockbuster-poster composition. Keep all Japanese typography crisp, clean, and perfectly legible.
